.. _plotfont:

plotfont
========

These attributes are native attributes from matplotlib, 

please see http://matplotlib.sourceforge.net/api/font_manager_api.html#matplotlib.font_manager.FontProperties

Summary
-------

+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|keyword             |default             |attribute           |value               |
+====================+====================+====================+====================+
|**family**          |sans-serif          |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*validate*          |ValidateChoice      |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |serif               |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |sans-serif          |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |cursive             |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |fantasy             |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |monospace           |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**fname**           |None                |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**size**            |['medium']          |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*validate*          |ValidateChoice      |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |xx-small            |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |x-small             |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |small               |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |medium              |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |large               |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |x-large             |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |xx-large            |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**stretch**         |['normal']          |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*validate*          |ValidateChoice      |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |float               |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |ultra-condensed     |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |extra-condensed     |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |condensed           |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |semi-condensed      |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |normal              |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |semi-expanded       |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |expanded            |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |extra-expanded      |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |ultra-expanded      |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**style**           |['normal']          |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*validate*          |ValidateChoice      |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |normal              |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |italic              |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |oblique             |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**variant**         |['normal']          |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*validate*          |ValidateChoice      |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |normal              |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |small-caps          |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|**weight**          |['normal']          |                    |                    |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*unique*            |True                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |*validate*          |ValidateChoice      |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |float               |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |ultralight          |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |light               |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |normal              |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |regular             |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |book                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |medium              |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |roman               |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |semibold            |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |demibold            |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |demi                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |bold                |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |heavy               |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |extra bold          |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
|                    |                    |                    |black               |
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+
+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+--------------------+

Keywords
--------

family
^^^^^^

default: **sans-serif**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|validate                                         |ValidateChoice                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |serif                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |sans-serif                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |cursive                                          |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |fantasy                                          |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |monospace                                        |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

fname
^^^^^

default: **None**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

size
^^^^

default: **medium**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|validate                                         |ValidateChoice                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |xx-small                                         |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |x-small                                          |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |small                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |medium                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |large                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |x-large                                          |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |xx-large                                         |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

stretch
^^^^^^^

default: **normal**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|validate                                         |ValidateChoice                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |float                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |ultra-condensed                                  |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |extra-condensed                                  |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |condensed                                        |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |semi-condensed                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |normal                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |semi-expanded                                    |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |expanded                                         |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |extra-expanded                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |ultra-expanded                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

style
^^^^^

default: **normal**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|validate                                         |ValidateChoice                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |normal                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |italic                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |oblique                                          |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

variant
^^^^^^^

default: **normal**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|validate                                         |ValidateChoice                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |normal                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |small-caps                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

weight
^^^^^^

default: **normal**

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|validate                                         |ValidateChoice                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |float                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |ultralight                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |light                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |normal                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |regular                                          |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |book                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |medium                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |roman                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |semibold                                         |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |demibold                                         |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |demi                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |bold                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |heavy                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |extra bold                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |black                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
